runtimeShimSweep.scope: runtime/src, including the frozen upstream mirror
runtimeShimSweep.threshold: >50% imports plus forwarding statements across fewer than 40 significant source lines

detectorRules.rule: Multi-line re-export statements count every significant forwarding line, not one logical statement.
Import-heavy modules without forwarding LOC are not shim behavior.
The ZC-20 custom gate scans tracked files under runtime/src rather than only newly added files.
Named type re-exports and default-exported one-line forwarding functions count as forwarding LOC.
